title: Tier-2 Crafters & Workshops
subtitle: Putting skilled hands to a station

pages.text: Tier-2 stations — the fletchery, woodworking table, pottery slab, and crafting stone — are run by a single generic &6crafter&r job. The station decides the specialty: which recipes, which tool, which minigame. You do not assign a separate job per station.

Use the &6Workshop Rod&r to draw a box around a station, turning it into a managed Workshop. Crafters assigned there pull inputs from storage and fulfill work without rest. Shift-right-click inside a workshop to open its menu.

Workshops run a FIFO &6order queue&r. Orders outrank standing minimum-stock production, so a placed order is crafted first; blocked orders are skipped until their inputs arrive. Quality on skilled crafts comes from the worker's equipment, not the job.
